table.name: gubee_integration_queue
table.comment: Table for storing integration queue data

column.name: queue_id
column.comment: Primary key for the queue item

column.name: handler
column.comment: Name of the process to be executed

column.name: payload
column.comment: Data to be processed by the queue item

column.name: status
column.comment: Status of the queue item (0 for pending, 1 for processing, 2 for completed)

column.name: error_message
column.comment: Error message if the queue item failed to process

column.name: response
column.comment: Response data from the queue item processing

column.name: executed_at
column.comment: Timestamp when the queue item was last executed

column.name: attempts
column.comment: Number of attempts made to process the queue item

column.name: created_at
column.comment: Timestamp when the queue item was created

column.name: updated_at
column.comment: Timestamp when the queue item was last updated

table.name: gubee_integration_log
table.comment: Table for storing integration log data

column.name: log_id
column.comment: Primary key for the log entry

column.name: level
column.comment:
Severity level of the log entry based on PSR-3 levels:
- 0 for emergency
- 1 for alert
- 2 for critical
- 3 for error
- 4 for warning
- 5 for notice
- 6 for info
- 7 for debug

column.name: context
column.comment: Additional context information for the log entry

column.name: created_at
column.comment: Timestamp when the log entry was created
